sentence_reviews.text: Robustness and out-of-distribution evaluation stress a model under corruptions, subgroup shifts, unseen domains, adversarial inputs, and changing deployment conditions.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: NIST AI RMF covers robustness, validation, monitoring, and risk under use contexts; Deep Learning discusses generalization, adversarial examples, and dataset/distribution concerns; AIMA covers probability and evaluation foundations.
sentence_reviews.notes: The cited sources support the main technical relationship, but the wording combines atlas taxonomy terms rather than a single quoted source claim.

sentence_reviews.text: Coverage is necessarily incomplete: measured proxies, policies, and test suites cannot enumerate every deployment context or adversary. Its direct dependencies include Probability theory, Benchmarks, test suites & task metrics.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Synthesized from cited node sources plus the atlas dependency context in data/atlas.json.
sentence_reviews.notes: Limitation is reviewed as a broad synthesis/tradeoff statement for the family-level node, not as a direct quotation from one source.
